flow-definition.description: project-examples npm-example: jf npm-config, install, publish, Build Info (env/git), rt build-publish.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: JFROG_SERVER_ID
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: JFrog Platform Server ID (Jenkins → JFrog configuration).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: JFROG_BUILD_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Artifactory build-info name. Empty = job short name (JOB_BASE_NAME).

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: NPM_REPO_RESOLVE
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Virtual (or remote) npm repository for dependency resolution.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: NPM_REPO_DEPLOY
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Local npm repository for publishing the tarball.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: NPM_INSTALL_ARGS
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Extra args to pass to npm install only (space-separated), e.g. --omit=dev
